roa.docketEntryComment: Defendant Successfully Completed Deferred Entry of Judgment
DEFT'S MOT BAIL HRG, RELEASE OR, OR BAIL REDUCTION FILED AT INSISTENCE

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/X:AS TO COUNT 7/CH3:ISS:PROB 1 Y:PJ 137 D/CTS:137/PPRFCOMP/DNACOMP/IND/WS/WEAP/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/SAORD/SA1:ERMIAS KIDANE AND LEWAN FTAU/SAORD3/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/RESTR/X:AS TO COUNTS 5 AND 6, DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT, SENTENCING SHALL BE DEFERRED FOR APERIOD OF TWO YEARS, IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS:/DEF:SHALL COMPLETE 50 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE, ATTENDANGER MANAGEMENT COURSES TO BE MONITORED BY APD, OBEY ALL LAWS, WRITE APOLOGY LETTERS TO  THE VICTIMS, PAY RESTITUTION AS OWED, AND BE SUBJECTED TO AWARRANTLESS THROUGHTHE TWO YEAR PERIOD,/X:SHOULD THE DEFENDANT COMPLETE THE ABOVE TERMS OF THE DEJ, SUFFER NO NEW ARRESTS RESULTING IN CHARGES IN ANY JURISDICTION, AND HAVE NO PROBATION VIOLATIONS, THE PLEAS MAY BE WITHDRAWN AND THE COUNTS SHALL BE DISMISSED,/CONTD:POSSIBILE DISMISSAL ON DEJ COUNTS 5 AND 6, OR TO SET SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL:PTC & POSSIBLE DISPO/LD:04-19-21/VD:TRIAL DATE OF 04-19-21/ /X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE INFORMATION TO ADD COUNTS 5 AND 6, PC 245(A)(4), BOTH FELONIES, AND COUNT 7, A VIOLATION OF PC 245(A)(4), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWA/IRR/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENTPLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 5,6,7/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION AS TO COUNT7 AND DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS TO COUNTS 5 AND 6/PRES:05-03-21/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION FOR RELEASE ON OWN RECOGNIZANCE OR BAIL REDUCTION/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/X:BAIL REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET,/X:TRIAL DATE OF 04-02-21IS CONFIRMED,/ /CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 04-19-21/CONTD: JURY TRIAL/DOP/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 23/TRANS 23:FORTHWITH FOR DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:JUSTIN BLANKEN, CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL OFFICER/WIT SWORN:BRIAN PHILLIPS, CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL DETECTIVE//EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 - PHOTO OF A DARK VEHICLE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 2 - PHOTO OF REAR OF VEHICLE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 3 - PHOTO OF VEHCILE LICENSE PLATE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 4 - PHOTO OF A SHELL CASING/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 5 - PHOTO OF A SHELL CASING/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 6 - PHOTO OF BACK OF A DODGE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 7 - PHOTO OFGLOVED HAND HOLDING AN OBJECT/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 8 - CD CONTAINING VIDEO/HTA1:1, 2 AND 3/NB/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON 02-17-21 IN D22/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING & DA MOTION TO DETAIN/LDPX:02-04-21/X:DEFENSE MOTION FOR RELEASE ON APPROPRIATE CONDITIONS FILED IN OPEN COURT,/X:DEFENSE MOTION IS DENIED,/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS GRANTED,/NB/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:4 HOURS/DOP/

/CAL: ARRIAGNMENT/TN: LANGI TALIFOLAU TOLI/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,//NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 02-04-21 (30TH)/987,2/NB/SA1: ERMIAS KIDANE AND LEWAN FTAU/SAORD/SAORD3/X: PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X: EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X: ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/CONTD: MOTION TO DETAIN AND  TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 3 HRS/DOP/
